title: Fix voice greeting, command execution, mentor character speech, and PC control system

requirements.text: On successful login, after the transition screen completes, the assistant must greet the user with synthesized speech using SpeechSynthesis API. The spoken greeting must say 'Welcome back, Master [username]' (e.g., 'Welcome back, Master RockyRoy') using the time-based prefix (Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening). This audio greeting must play automatically without any user interaction — the text display alone is not sufficient.

quotes: after login it show welcome text no audio it have to great with voice welcome back master rockyroy

acceptanceCriteria: After transition screen, SpeechSynthesis speaks 'Good [Morning/Afternoon/Evening], Welcome back, Master [username]' automatically
No user click or interaction is needed to trigger the voice greeting
The greeting uses the correct time-of-day prefix based on current hour
The username used is the logged-in user's name from their profile

requirements.text: Fix the voice assistant command processing engine in useVoiceAssistant.ts. Currently the assistant echoes back the user's speech verbatim instead of parsing and executing the intended command. The command parser must correctly identify intents such as 'open YouTube', 'open [URL/app name]', 'volume up/down', 'brightness up/down', 'scroll up/down', 'search Wikipedia for [topic]', and execute the corresponding action. For 'open YouTube', it must call window.open('https://www.youtube.com', '_blank') immediately. The assistant must NOT respond with 'Got it! You said: ...' — it must execute the action and confirm it with a contextual spoken response (e.g., 'Opening YouTube now, sir.').

quotes: i told open youtube it just that sentence not done it
repaet the same text not doing the action

acceptanceCriteria: Saying 'open YouTube' (in any language, including Telugu transliteration) causes window.open('https://www.youtube.com', '_blank') to be called
Saying 'open [website name]' opens the corresponding URL in a new tab
The assistant never responds with 'Got it! You said: [transcript]' as a fallback — it must parse and act on the command
After executing an action, the assistant speaks a contextual confirmation (e.g., 'Opening YouTube now, sir.')
Command parsing handles Telugu-script wake word + command combinations (e.g., 'జార్విస్ ఓపెన్ youtube' correctly maps to open YouTube)
The command loop returns to wake-word listening after each action automatically

requirements.text: Rewrite the mentor character dialogue system in mentorMessages.ts and MentorCard.tsx so that each mentor speaks in their authentic movie/anime character voice and style. For Rengoku Kojiro specifically, all messages, motivational quotes, reminders, and spoken responses must use his actual catchphrases and speech patterns from Demon Slayer (e.g., 'SET YOUR HEART ABLAZE!', 'Umai! Umai! Umai!', 'My fire burns brighter than anyone!', addressing the user as a fellow Hashira candidate). When the mentor speaks via SpeechSynthesis, the spoken text must be in Rengoku's authentic dialogue style — not generic AI assistant responses. Extend the same authentic-style dialogue for other preset mentors (Naruto, Tony Stark, etc.).

quotes: 3 charcter mentor have to talk like real movie charcter rengoku should speak in the real

acceptanceCriteria: Rengoku's motivational messages use his actual Demon Slayer catchphrases and speech style
Rengoku never says generic phrases like 'I'm here to help' — all dialogue is in-character
When the mentor card triggers a spoken message, SpeechSynthesis speaks it in Rengoku's authentic style
Other preset mentors (Naruto, Tony Stark) also have in-character authentic dialogue sets
The mentor's spoken responses during scheduling reminders and daily tips are fully in-character

requirements.text: Implement real OS-level PC control for volume and brightness via web platform APIs and progressive enhancement. For volume control: use the Web Audio API's GainNode on a persistent AudioContext to control system audio output level when possible, and additionally attempt the Media Session API. For brightness: use the Screen Brightness API (window.screen.brightness) where supported (Chrome on Android/desktop), falling back to the CSS filter overlay only as a last resort but clearly labeled as 'display overlay only'. For opening apps/URLs: use window.open() with '_blank' target which actually opens in the OS default browser. Clearly indicate in the UI which controls are operating at OS level vs. app-simulation level. Remove any false indicators that suggest OS-level control when only app-level simulation is occurring.

quotes: pc control are done within the app out of the is not happen if i say reduce volume it is reduce in the app not pc same as all feature are working in the app not pc not happening

acceptanceCriteria: Volume up/down voice command uses Web Audio API GainNode on a persistent AudioContext to affect actual audio output level
Brightness control attempts window.screen.brightness API first; falls back to CSS overlay only if unavailable
The UI labels each PC control indicating whether it is 'OS Level' or 'App Overlay' so the user is not misled
Opening YouTube or any URL via voice command calls window.open(url, '_blank') which opens in the real OS browser
Voice commands for volume/brightness/open execute the OS-level action without requiring any UI button click
PCControlsPanel.tsx and usePCControls.ts are updated to use the best available OS-level API for each control

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All voice greeting and command execution must remain browser-based (Web Speech API, SpeechSynthesis, window.open) — no native desktop app required
Maintain the existing JARVIS visual theme (dark #050a0f background, cyan #00e5ff accents, gold #ffa726 mentor accents)
nonGoals: Installing or communicating with a native desktop agent or OS daemon
Modifying the backend Motoko actor for these fixes
Changing the authentication or user registration flow
Redesigning the dashboard layout or visual theme
